rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §29.0485, which concerns finality of commissioner determinations under a specific education subchapter.
quote: Sec. 29.0485. DETERMINATION OF COMMISSIONER FINAL. Notwithstanding Section 7.057, a determination of the commissioner under this subchapter is final and may not be appealed.
_note: No overlap between proposed change and rule text.
